use_codes.desc: FOR WOMEN WITH SEVERE DIARRHEA-PREDOMINANT IRRITABLE BOWEL SYNDROME (IBS)

indications.text:
LOTRONEX is indicated only for women with severe diarrhea-predominant irritable
bowel syndrome (IBS) who have:
• chronic IBS symptoms (generally lasting 6 months or longer),
• had anatomic or biochemical abnormalities of the gastrointestinal tract excluded, and
• not responded adequately to conventi...
